from __future__ import annotations


def parse_order(raw: str) -> dict[str, str]:
    key, value = raw.split("=", 1)
    return {key: value}


def render_order(order: dict[str, str]) -> str:
    return f"<div>{order}</div>"


def god_function_negative(raw: str) -> str:
    return render_order(parse_order(raw))
